name: RPlog_Griffons_Betrayal_and_a_Mandalorian_Plant
title: Griffon's Betrayal and a Mandalorian Plant
summary: In the KOS Gardens aboard Kichnar Station, the scarred and volatile Morganna trades barbed words with the aloof Griffon admiral Lanthazar and his nervous aide Fay before colliding with the perpetually irritated Grathix, who has sought her out to see her prized carnivorous plant. Nearby, Leia and Han Solo reunite while Lanthazar presses the princess for New Republic support against the Empire, and Kadgie and the Horansi Machkeu drift through the gathering. Morganna and Grathix leave for the starport, where they cross paths with the Grand Admiral Adlerson and the ambassador Erin Abrosen; Morganna covertly warns the Imperial entourage of New Republic presence before retreating into a rain-soaked Plaxton square, where Machkeu seeks to mend their strained friendship and she pushes him away for his own safety. Retiring at last to her ship the Sable Fox, Morganna shows off her plant, only for Grathix to reveal himself as one of the last sons of Mandalore: he poisons the bloom to force her hand, demanding it in exchange for what he knows of the dead world of Mandalore. Enraged, Morganna beats him until she breaks her own hand against a strut, then surrenders the plant and a message for her mysterious patron, and Grathix departs with a warrior's farewell as she curses him and finally sleeps.
